description: A vertical (960x1200) designed graphic celebrating LGBTQIA+ Pride Month, part of a DHS employee-spotlight series. The layout has a soft pastel rainbow-tinted off-white paper background. In the top-left corner, bold white outlined italic capitals read 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' set against a fan of diagonal rainbow stripes (a multicolor Pride/Progress palette). Top-right, in a clean sans serif, reads 'DHS celebrates' (gray) above 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' rendered in rainbow-colored letters. Centered below is a circular photo portrait of a smiling person with short hair, glasses, and a dark button-up shirt, framed by a thick rainbow gradient ring. Below the portrait is a large pull-quote with a big blue quotation mark: 'The month honors those who came before us, who took great risks, in some instances, sacrificing their own lives to stand up and advocate that LGBTQIA+ people are worthy of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, just like everyone else.' Lower-left attribution in blue/gray reads 'Stacie S.' / 'USCIS, Immigration Services Officer II' / 'with DHS for 21 Years', preceded by a small rainbow vertical bar. Bottom-right shows the circular blue-and-white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal beside a row of rainbow-colored vertical brush strokes. The style is corporate diversity-campaign branding: clean typography, employee testimonial format, inclusive messaging. Apparent intent: workplace-pride/DEI public messaging signaling DHS support for LGBTQIA+ staff during Pride Month (Biden-era DHS messaging).
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; 'The month honors those who came before us, who took great risks, in some instances, sacrificing their own lives to stand up and advocate that LGBTQIA+ people are worthy of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, just like everyone else.'; Stacie S., USCIS, Immigration Services Officer II, with DHS for 21 Years
